title: WetLab-2 RT-qPCR procedure
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3mels","text":"Procedure used for RT-qPCR in the WetLab-2 study","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"42b37","text":"- Use gloves","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"acc5m","text":"- RNase clean work surfaces (spray with RNase Zap, then 70% Ethanol)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Preparation of qPCR reactions (per 25ul reaction): Promega GoTaq Probe Master Mix (2X): 12.5 ul Forward Primer (20X): 1 ul Reverse Primer (20X): 1 ul Hydrolysis Probe (20X): 1 ul DNA Template: varied from 1 pg to 1ug per reaction Molecular Biology Grade Water: to 25 ul total volume

Preparation of RT-qPCR reactions (per 25ul reaction): Promega GoTaq Probe Master Mix (2X): 12.5 ul GoScript RT Mix for 1-step RT-qPCR: 5 ul Forward Primer (20X): 1 ul Reverse Primer (20X): 1 ul Hydrolysis Probe (20X): 1 ul RNA Template: varied as listed (usually around 5ng) Molecular Biology Grade Water: to 25 ul total volume
creator: Macarena Parra
